title: refactor(web): clean up legacy routes and relocate presigned + composio-connectors
body:
## Summary

Frontend route cleanup pass (`web/app`) — dead-route removal, one architectural relocation, and one layering fix. Each change was verified against its actual callers (grep + git history + backend where relevant) rather than assumed. Net **−334 lines**.

**Relocation + auth**
- **`refactor(web): move image/video presigned routes into /api/`** — `image/presigned` + `video/presigned` moved out of `[locale]/(app)/` into `src/app/api/`. They were locale-prefixed page routes only because they predate the BFF convention; sitting outside `/api/` also left them **unauthenticated**. Under `/api/`, the middleware auth gate now enforces a verified Bearer token. All three callers (chat composer, subagent panel, agent-avatar upload) already send the token, so behavior is unchanged for them — this just closes anonymous access to the R2 write-grant. Dropped the dead `requireAuth` config field.

**Layering fix**
- **`refactor(web): hoist composio-connectors UI to the shared component layer`** — the real connector UI lived inside the *legacy* `composio-connectors` route dir, which redirects to `/integrations/connector`, which then imported back into the legacy dir (and `claw-settings` cr
